channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: 'Jai Shri Ram' Chants In Dhaka As Thousands Protest 'Desecration' Of Image

media:content.media:description: Thousands of Hindus gathered for a torchlight procession in Dhaka on Friday

item.description: Thousands of Hindus gathered for a torchlight procession in Dhaka on Friday, chanting "Jai Shri Ram" and demanding the arrest of those accused of insulting the image.
item.content:encoded: Thousands of Hindus gathered for a torchlight procession in Dhaka on Friday, chanting "Jai Shri Ram" and demanding the arrest of those accused of insulting the image.

item.title: Iran Closes Strait Of Hormuz Again Over Israel's Attacks On Lebanon

media:content.media:description: Iran has closed the Strait of Hormuz again

item.description: Iran said that the closure was the "first step" in response to what it described as breaches of commitments.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1115909/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Iran said that the closure was the "first step" in response to what it described as breaches of commitments.

item.title: How Trump's New Plane Compares With His Private Jet, Old Air Force One

media:content.media:description: The new luxury aircraft will now serve as Air Force One.

item.description: The new aircraft is a 747-8i jumbo jet that was modified as a VVIP business liner for the Qatari royal family.
item.content:encoded: The new aircraft is a 747-8i jumbo jet that was modified as a VVIP business liner for the Qatari royal family.

item.title: Iranian Crude Loading Resumes At Kharg Island After US Blockade Lifted

media:content.media:description: Three very large crude carriers are moored at the Sea Island terminal to the west of Kharg

item.description: Three very large crude carriers, each capable of hauling about 2 million barrels of crude, are moored at the Sea Island terminal to the west of Kharg, according to ship tracking data compiled by Bloomberg.
item.content:encoded: Three very large crude carriers, each capable of hauling about 2 million barrels of crude, are moored at the Sea Island terminal to the west of Kharg, according to ship tracking data compiled by Bloomberg.

item.title: "My Popularity None Of Your Concern": Trump-Meloni Photo War Escalates

media:content.media:description: Trump said that Meloni asked him for a photo "over and over" during the G7 Summit in France

item.description: In a post on X, US President Donald Trump said that Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni asked him for a photo "over and over" during the G7 Summit in France. He claimed that Meloni is resorting to these tactics because she is "doing poorly" in Ital
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1115847/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>In a post on X, US President Donald Trump said that Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni asked him for a photo "over and over" during the G7 Summit in France. He claimed that Meloni is resorting to these tactics because she is "doing poorly" in Ital

item.title: 'Vigilant To Ensure Deal Obeyed': US Military After Iran Shuts Hormuz

media:content.media:description: The renewed tension came as US and Iranian negotiators were expected in Switzerland to continue talks.

item.description: Iran had announced moments earlier that it was closing the strait in response to Israeli strikes on Lebanon, deeming them a violation of its fragile deal with the United States.
item.content:encoded: Iran had announced moments earlier that it was closing the strait in response to Israeli strikes on Lebanon, deeming them a violation of its fragile deal with the United States.

item.title: US-Iran War News Live Updates: Iran Negotiators Leave For Switzerland To Discuss Peace Deal With US

media:content.media:description: US-Iran Peace Talks Live Updates

item.description: US-Iran Peace Talks Live Updates: JD Vance had on Thursday cancelled his trip to Switzerland amid rising tension in Lebanon between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Peace Talks Live Updates: JD Vance had on Thursday cancelled his trip to Switzerland amid rising tension in Lebanon between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah.

item.title: Iran Negotiators Leave For Switzerland To Discuss Peace Deal With US

media:content.media:description: The Iran team left for Switzerland a day after talks were scheduled to happen.

item.description: An Iranian negotiating team left Iran for Switzerland on Saturday for discussions on the implementation of the US-Iran agreement.
item.content:encoded: An Iranian negotiating team left Iran for Switzerland on Saturday for discussions on the implementation of the US-Iran agreement.

item.title: "Which Tribe?" JD Vance's Mother Was Confused About Usha's Indian Origin

media:content.media:description: Vance said that when he told his mother that Usha was an Indian, she asked, "Which tribe?"

item.description: In the podcast, US Vice President JD Vance said that when he told his mother that Usha was an Indian, she asked, "Which tribe?"
item.content:encoded: In the podcast, US Vice President JD Vance said that when he told his mother that Usha was an Indian, she asked, "Which tribe?"

item.title: Israel Strikes On Lebanon Continue As Threat Looms Over US-Iran Deal

media:content.media:description: Hezbollah and Israel went to war just days after the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran.

item.description: Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon on Saturday killed at least 16 people, including two children, hours after reports emerged of a ceasefire agreement.
item.content:encoded: Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon on Saturday killed at least 16 people, including two children, hours after reports emerged of a ceasefire agreement.

item.title: 'No Press Freedom': JD Vance Blames Pak For Delay In Releasing Iran Agreement

media:content.media:description: Vance said although the US wanted to release the agreement, they could only do so two days later

item.description: Speaking in a podcast called 'Interesting Times with Ross Douthat', US Vice President JD Vance said that although the US wanted to release the agreement on June 15, they could only do so two days later.
item.content:encoded: Speaking in a podcast called 'Interesting Times with Ross Douthat', US Vice President JD Vance said that although the US wanted to release the agreement on June 15, they could only do so two days later.

item.title: Pakistan Interior Minister Lands In Iran After Switzerland Talks Postponed

media:content.media:description: Iran on Thursday announced it signed a deal with the United States to end the hostilities.

item.description: Tehran and Washington were due to hold talks in Switzerland on Friday, after signing a memorandum of understanding ending the war in the Middle East, but the latest negotiations have been postponed with no new date announced.
item.content:encoded: Tehran and Washington were due to hold talks in Switzerland on Friday, after signing a memorandum of understanding ending the war in the Middle East, but the latest negotiations have been postponed with no new date announced.

item.title: After Algae, Peeling Paint Adds To Donald Trump's Pool Project Problems

media:content.media:description: The problems with the peeling paint appear widespread across the 610-metre-long pool.

item.description: The pool repainting project, which US media have reported cost around $14 million, is part of Trump's drive to put his stamp on Washington.
item.content:encoded: The pool repainting project, which US media have reported cost around $14 million, is part of Trump's drive to put his stamp on Washington.

item.title: Arrested Iranian Singer Parastoo Ahmadi To Get 74 'Lashes' For Performing Without Hijab

media:content.media:description: The artists were accused of offending public decency

item.description: A criminal court in Iran's Qom province ordered 74 stokes for the group, along with a two-year ban on leaving the country and a two-year restriction on participating in artistic activities.
item.content:encoded: A criminal court in Iran's Qom province ordered 74 stokes for the group, along with a two-year ban on leaving the country and a two-year restriction on participating in artistic activities.

item.title: Soviet Leader Leonid Brezhnev's Great-Grandson, Fighting For Russia, Captured By Ukraine: Report

media:content.media:description: File photo

item.description: Anton Milaev is said to have joined the Russian military as a combat engineer in autumn 2025.
item.content:encoded: Anton Milaev is said to have joined the Russian military as a combat engineer in autumn 2025.

item.title: Who Is Vivek Aggarwal, 1st Indian To Serve As Global Terror Watchdog FATF's Veep

media:content.media:description: Vivek Aggarwal is a 1994-batch Indian Administrative Service (IAS) officer

item.description: Currently serving as secretary, Ministry of Culture, Vivek Aggarwal is recognised for his expertise in fiscal management, public administration and policy implementation.
item.content:encoded: Currently serving as secretary, Ministry of Culture, Vivek Aggarwal is recognised for his expertise in fiscal management, public administration and policy implementation.

item.title: Deal Done, Trump's Envoy, Iran's Minister Head To Switzerland For Next Talks

media:content.media:description: Abbas Araghchi (R) and Steve Witkoff

item.description: JD Vance had canceled plans on Thursday to travel to Switzerland for the talks amid rising tension in Lebanon between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah.
item.content:encoded: JD Vance had canceled plans on Thursday to travel to Switzerland for the talks amid rising tension in Lebanon between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah.

item.title: 5 Killed As Israel Strikes Lebanon Despite Ceasefire With Hezbollah

media:content.media:description: Israeli warplanes and drones carried out a series of strikes across Nabatieh (File photo)

item.description: Israel and Hezbollah agreed to the ceasefire on Friday following an escalation in hostilities in Lebanon, according to a US official.
item.content:encoded: Israel and Hezbollah agreed to the ceasefire on Friday following an escalation in hostilities in Lebanon, according to a US official.

item.title: All About Donald Trump's New Air Force One: A $400 Million Jet Gifted By Qatar

media:content.media:description: The US military has finished modifying luxury jumbo jet valued at $400 million.

item.description: The United States Air Force has introduced a new "bridge aircraft", a modified Boeing 747-8i, to support presidential travel amid delays in the long-term Air Force One replacement programme.
item.content:encoded: The United States Air Force has introduced a new "bridge aircraft", a modified Boeing 747-8i, to support presidential travel amid delays in the long-term Air Force One replacement programme.

item.title: Woman Hailed As Hero For Saving Man's Life During New York Knicks Parade, Video Viral

media:content.media:description: EMT Simone Kelly rescues unresponsive man with Narcan at Knicks parade in New York.

item.description: Simone Kelly, EMT, saves a man from overdose using Narcan during a parade in New York.
item.content:encoded: Simone Kelly, EMT, saves a man from overdose using Narcan during a parade in New York.
